mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author, b.price, b.created_at, c.id AS cat_id, c.name AS cat_name FROM books b LEFT JOIN book_categories bc ON b.id = bc.book_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON bc.category_id = c.id ORDER BY b.id

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author, b.price, b.created_at, c.id AS cat_id, c.name AS cat_name FROM books b LEFT JOIN book_categories bc ON b.id = bc.book_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON bc.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (title, author, price, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{price}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT category_id FROM book_categories WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
